original_image_tags: Scan of a faded, pinkish-tan document back or routing slip. The paper has two punched holes at the top with some tearing. At the top left is a reversed (mirror-image) ink stamp, likely from the front side of the document. At the bottom is a block of reversed (mirror-image) routing stamps and notations. A small black horizontal line is visible near the center.
* At the top left, a reversed ink stamp reads:
* Near the top center, a reversed handwritten annotation in pencil or light ink reads:

elements.description: Reverse side of a document page featuring multiple ink stamps. Visible stamps include 'RECEIVED BY MATS MESSAGE CENTER', a date stamp 'FEB 13 20 18 1949', 'U.S.A.F. MILITARY AIR TRANSPORT SERVICE', and a reversed stamp in the upper left. Two black punched holes are visible at the top edge.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific text from stamps ('RECEIVED BY MATS MESSAGE CENTER', 'FEB 13 20 18 1949', 'U.S.A.F. MILITARY AIR TRANSPORT SERVICE') while Description A does not see or mention any of this readable text, describing only illegible reversed stamps.
